summary: **Taeha Kim** joined the group as a Visiting PhD Student from [Seoul National University](https://en.snu.ac.kr/). Sang-ri Yi joined the EMI Objective Resilience Committee and is co-organizing two mini-symposia at [EMI 2026](https://www.emi-conference.org/).
details: [MS 069](https://cdn.asce.org/asce-conferences/emi-conference.org/s3fs-public/EMI-2026-MS-NOV25.pdf#page=70): objective resilience in civil infrastructure systems.
[MS 072](https://cdn.asce.org/asce-conferences/emi-conference.org/s3fs-public/EMI-2026-MS-NOV25.pdf#page=73): uncertainty quantification and surrogate modeling for natural hazards engineering.
